arts.ttl: Stunning goals and incredible drama - Barca & Inter deliver match for the ages
arts.sum: Barcelona and Inter Milan deliver a night of high drama and superb goals in their Champions League semi-final first leg - BBC Sport takes a look at how it unfolded.

arts.ttl: Barça, Inter, Yamal deliver perfect Champions League night
arts.sum: Barça-Inter didn't go to script, and that unpredictability made for a brilliant Champions League semifinal.

arts.ttl: Barcelona teenager Yamal praised by friend and foe for performance against Inter
arts.sum: “He’s the kind of talent who is born every 50 years, I had never seen him live and he really impressed me today,” the Inter coach said after Yamal had helped Barcelona fight back in a scintillating 3-3 draw to start their Champions League semifinal on Wednesday. After witnessing from the touchline how Lamine Yamal pushed his Inter Milan to the limit, Simone Inzaghi said that talents like the Barcelona teenager come around only once in a half century.

arts.ttl: 'Future Ballon d'Or winner' - Yamal's 'outrageous' display against Inter
arts.sum: BBC Sport's Stephen Warnock says 17-year-old Barcelona winger Lamine Yamal is a future Ballon d'Or winner after his "outrageous" performance against Inter Milan in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final tie.

arts.ttl: Thuram and Dumfries return to energize Inter in draw at Barcelona in Champions League semifinals
arts.sum: Dumfries scored two and set up the opener for Thuram as Inter drew 3-3 at Barcelona in the first leg of their Champions League semifinal on Wednesday. Marcus Thuram and Denzel Dumfries returned and so did the goals for Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Inter boss Simone Inzaghi on Lamine Yamal: “He’s a talent that is born once every 50 years”
arts.sum: Serie A side Inter held Barcelona to a 3-3 draw in a thrilling game in the first leg of the Champions League semi-final and Simone Inzaghi had big words to…

arts.ttl: Raphinha breaks remarkable Lionel Messi record in epic Barcelona vs Inter Milan draw
arts.sum: Barcelona and Inter Milan played out an instant classic in the first leg of their Champions League semi-final and it turned out to be a night to remember for Raphinha

arts.ttl: Bastoni: ‘Lamine Yamal is incredible, Inter never give up’
arts.sum: Alessandro Bastoni was blown away by ‘incredible’ Lamine Yamal, but Inter will fight it out...

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand Causes a Stir With Bizarre Raphinha Claim During Barcelona 3-3 Inter
arts.sum: Raphinha played a huge part in Barcelona rescuing a draw against Inter Milan in the Champions League before Rio Ferdinand caused uproar.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star to miss Inter Milan 2nd leg through injury
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has been all but ruled out of the club’s upcoming meeting with Inter Milan. That’s according to Barca…
